sharc
Documentation développeur
AndradeInterpolator.h
1 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_ANDRADEPIECEWISEFUNCTION_ANDRADEINTERPOLATOR_H
2 #define ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_ANDRADEPIECEWISEFUNCTION_ANDRADEINTERPOLATOR_H
3 /* Author : ricois at Tue Oct 20 14:12:57 2009
4  * Generated by createNew
5  * Interpolation selon la formule d'Andrade :
6  * Sur un intervalle [x1,x2] de l'abscisse,
7  * Y = y(x) = a * ln( b/x )
8  * Ou a et b sont deux constantes.
9  *
10  * En posant y1 = y(x1) et y2 = y(x2), on
11  * / X2 * ( x - x1 ) y2 \
12  * Y(x) = y1 * exp | ------------------ * log ( ---- ) |
13  * \ X * ( x2 - x1 ) y1 /
14  * Voir UINTP1 du PumaFlow
15  *
16  */
17 
18 #include <arcane/utils/UtilsTypes.h>
19 #include <arcane/utils/Math.h>
20 #include <vector>
21 #include "ArcGeoSim/Numerics/Expressions/PieceWiseFunction/IPieceWiseFunction.h"
22 
23 namespace Arcane
24  {
25 
26  }
27 using namespace Arcane;
28 
29 class AndradeInterpolator
30  {
31 public:
33  AndradeInterpolator()
34  {
35  ;
36  }
37 
39  virtual
40  ~AndradeInterpolator()
41  {
42  }
43 
44 public:
45 
46  enum eProlongationType
47  {
48  ConstantProlongation, LinearProlongation
49  };
50 
51  //** Interpolator interval data type */
52  typedef Real IntervalData;
53 
55  inline static Real
56  interpolate(const Real* const x, const Real* y, const IntervalData* const coef,
57  const Real v)
58  {
60  return math::exp( *coef * ( v - *x ) / v ) * *y;
61  }
62 
64  inline static Real
65  differentiate(const Real* const x, const Real* const y,
66  const IntervalData* const coef, const Real v)
67  {
68  return math::exp( *coef * ( v - *x ) / v ) * *y * *coef * *x / v / v;
69  }
70 
72  inline static void
73  updateGhostPoints(const eProlongationType& prolongation_type,
74  Real* const x_begin, Real* const x_end, Real* const y_begin,
75  Real* const y_end)
76  {
77  switch (prolongation_type)
78  {
79  case (ConstantProlongation):
81  *x_begin = *(x_begin + 1);
82  *x_end = *(x_end - 1);
83  *y_begin = *(y_begin + 1);
84  *y_end = *(y_end - 1);
85  break;
86  case (LinearProlongation):
88  *x_begin = *(x_begin + 1);
89  *x_end = *(x_end - 1);
90  *y_begin = *(y_begin + 1);
91  *y_end = *(y_end - 1);
92  break;
93  };
94  }
95 
97  inline static const IntervalData&
98  getForbiddenInterval(const Real& forbidden_interval_value)
99  {
100  return forbidden_interval_value;
101  }
102 
104  inline static void
105  getConnectedIntervalNumber(Integer & nb_linterval, Integer & nb_rinterval)
106  {
107  nb_linterval = 1;
108  nb_rinterval = 1;
109  }
110 
112  inline static IntervalData
113  getDefaultInterval()
114  {
115  return 0;
116  }
117 
122  static void
123  computeIntervalCoef(const Real* const x_left_bound,
124  const Real* const y_left_bound, const Integer& interval_number,
125  IntervalData* const interval_coeff)
126  {
127  *interval_coeff = *(x_left_bound + 1) / ( *(x_left_bound + 1) - *x_left_bound ) *
128  math::log( *(y_left_bound + 1) / *y_left_bound ) ;
129  }
130 
132  inline static void
133  updateGhostIntervals(const eProlongationType& prolongation_type,
134  Real* const x_begin, Real* const x_end, Real* const y_begin,
135  Real* const y_end, Real* const interval_begin, Real* const interval_end)
136  {
137  switch (prolongation_type)
138  {
139  case (ConstantProlongation):
141  *interval_begin = 0;
142  *interval_end = 0;
143  break;
144  case (LinearProlongation):
146  *interval_begin = *(interval_begin + 1);
147  *interval_end = *(interval_end - 1);
148  break;
149  }
150  }
151 
153  inline static void
154  getInterpolatorType(
155  PieceWiseFunctionType::eInterpolatorType & interpolator_type)
156  {
157  interpolator_type = PieceWiseFunctionType::AndradeInterpolator;
158  }
159 
160  };
161 
162 #endif /* ARCGEOSIM_NUMERICS_EXPRESSIONS_ANDRADEPIECEWISEFUNCTION_ANDRADEINTERPOLATOR_H */

AndradeInterpolator::computeIntervalCoef
static void computeIntervalCoef(const Real *const x_left_bound, const Real *const y_left_bound, const Integer &interval_number, IntervalData *const interval_coeff)
Static interval coefficient precalculation method coef = x2 * ln (y2/y1) / (x2 - x1)

Static inline update ghost value method.
